overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a player moving from behind a metal grate through a shallow pool toward a traditional Japanese wooden building with a waterfall. The environment features heavy snowfall, icy rocks, and a serene, cold atmosphere with blue-green lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone tunnel with metal grate overlooking snowy waterfall

events.description: passes through the metal grate gate from enclosed tunnel to open pool area

agents.ego_description: slowly wading through shallow water toward the metal grate, viewing the waterfall and snowy landscape beyond

entered.detail: ornate vertical metal bars with geometric patterns blocking the tunnel exit
cascading waterfall flowing into the pool beyond the gate
rocky cliff face covered in snow rising beside the waterfall
rocky cliff face covered in snow on the right side of the pool
Japanese wooden structure with glowing windows and icicles hanging from the roof

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from a first-person perspective behind an ornate metal grate, looking out at a snowy waterfall and traditional Japanese building. The player is wading through shallow water in an enclosed stone tunnel, moving slowly toward the gate as snow falls outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered pool with waterfall and traditional Japanese architecture

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow pool toward the wooden building, navigating between snow-covered boulders in the water

entered.detail: large rocks covered in snow emerging from the shallow water
stone staircase with railings leading up the right cliffside
traditional Japanese stone lantern emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the player enters an open pool area surrounded by snow-covered cliffs. The camera moves steadily through the water toward the traditional wooden building with glowing windows, passing large snow-covered boulders while the waterfall roars in the center and snow continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the confines of a stone tunnel into a vast, snow-covered sanctuary. It begins behind an ornate metal grate, wading slowly through shallow water while looking out toward a distant waterfall and a traditional Japanese building. As the camera passes through the gate, the enclosed space opens into a wide pool area surrounded by towering, snow-covered cliffs. The movement continues steadily through the water, passing large icy boulders as the roar of the central waterfall grows louder. The scene finally culminates in an approach toward the wooden building, its glowing windows contrasting with the heavy snowfall and cold blue-green atmosphere.
